examples: They made their way from Spain to France and thence to England.
I ran straight up to Columbia County, then turned East, came down the Harlem Valley and thence home.
The woman exclaimed, and thence the proverb: It is so mahogany!
They quickly find their way into the hands of touts, and thence to enthusiastic fans.
Originally, the opera was to have gone on to New York's Lincoln Centre, and thence to Paris.
